title: FactQuery
description: Versioned request envelope sent by the assent provider host to a fact provider (HTTP body or exec stdin). Carries ONLY declared projections — never full old/new content without an explicit trusted capability, never credentials.

queryId.description: Host-generated correlation id; the response must echo it.

asOf.description: Host-pinned evaluation instant (RFC 3339). Providers derive observedAt/expiresAt from it; keeps the decision path free of provider wall clocks.

outputs.description: Names of the declared outputs the host is requesting; must be a subset of the provider's declaration.

projections.description: The only change content a provider may see: the projections its declaration requested, intersected with what the change actually touched.

pointer.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer into the governed entry.

old.description: Value at the pointer on the target ref (absent when the pointer was added).

new.description: Value at the pointer on the merge result (absent when the pointer was removed).

deadlineMs.description: Soft deadline hint; the host enforces its own hard timeout regardless.
